description.value:
Send Prescription processing vvv-geaccepteerdmetwijziging building blocks for patient J. van XXX_Reenen
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 23.6 afhandelen voorschrift t.b.v. VVV <span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full xforms-visited" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group xforms-visited" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group xforms-visited" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group xforms-visited" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙21"><span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙16">TEST Scenarioset 23.6 afhandelen voorschrift t.b.v. gedeeltelijke overname VVV
Send Prescription processing vvv-geaccepteerdmetwijziging resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.
Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '2239671|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (OMEPRAZOL TEVA CAPSULE MSR 20MG)
